raw_result.description: AI-powered academic search platform for searching and synthesizing peer-reviewed research papers.
raw_result.auth_notes: Consensus Search API docs show authentication via x-api-key header. Official MCP docs describe OAuth sign-in for ChatGPT/Claude Desktop and API key access for enterprise users.
raw_result.gating_reason: Official pricing exposes free user plans, but the Search API is priced separately at $0.10/request under team/enterprise-oriented offerings rather than as a clearly free self-serve developer tier.

api_surface.breadth: Public Consensus Search API with documented search endpoints plus first-party MCP server for research search workflows.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official MCP docs publish a first-party MCP server at https://mcp.consensus.app/mcp for clients including Claude Desktop, ChatGPT Deep Research, Claude Code, and Cursor.

raw_result.blocker: API access appears tied to paid/team-oriented pricing rather than a clearly free self-serve developer tier.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: No explicit rate-limit policy was verified on the official pages reviewed; pricing page states API usage is billed per request at $0.10/request.
raw_result.notable_signals: Has official first-party API docs and an official MCP server, which is a strong agent-enablement signal for research workflows.
